name: cc-masterclass-kit
description: The worked SDLC toolkit from the Claude Code Masterclass for embedded-C teams. Bundles slash commands (/draft-req, /ship-feature, /standup), skills (test-gen, release-notes, git-insights), sub-agents (design-reviewer, test-writer, triage, security-reviewer, reviewer), and gate hooks (secret-scan PreToolUse, clang-format PostToolUse). One install delivers the whole kit.
